title: Mossbound
description: A first-person fantasy melee run through five escalating waves of corrupted grove creatures, ending in a showdown with the Thornheart.

prompt.objective: Build a first-person fantasy melee game with five waves and a boss finale.

mintAssets.brief: Grove creatures spanning swarm, armored, ranged, and boss roles.
Mossy ruins, vegetation, first-person weapons, rewards, traps, and shrine props.
Forest and boss loops with melee, damage, pickup, and level-up effects.

experience: Fight five waves with sword attacks, stamina, upgrades, and Grove Blast.
Keep combat, rewards, wave state, and the boss readable in first person.
prompt.visualDirection: Cyan runes and gold rewards in a dark enchanted forest with a fantasy HUD.

thumbnail.alt: A rune sword facing corrupted grove creatures among mossy ruins

social.title: Mossbound
social.description: Survive five waves of corrupted grove creatures and confront the Thornheart.

image.alt: A rune sword facing corrupted grove creatures among mossy ruins
